title: SPNV — Spinner-alt GWAVE preset (Robotron)
tldr: Robotron alternative to `SPNRV` — different wavetable / period combination, used in some spinner contexts.
how: GWAVE preset, short-echo, single-period — same family as SPNRV but with its own preset bytes. Useful as an A/B comparison against SPNRV to hear how two different parameter choices produce different perceived "spinner gestures".
watch: A/B vs SPNRV in the diff panel.
